texto: May God show light to those who are groping in the dark not knowing which direction to take and in the process hurting others- knowingly or unknowingly. A single humble candle can defeat even the most stubborn darkness
autor: an enlightened person can clear the cobwebs of even the most confused mind. May God enlighten everyone- especially those that hurt others.
explicacao: Citação de an enlightened person can clear the cobwebs of even the most confused mind. May God enlighten everyone- especially those that hurt others. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “May God show light to those who are groping in the dark not knowing which direction to take and i…” articula reflexao, latika-teotia, light em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e reflexao.
